newsitems.title: Server Migration Update & Steam Market Reopening Schedule
newsitems.author: nugemstudio
newsitems.contents: [p]Hello,[/p][p]This is the <TBH: Task Bar Hero> development team.[/p][p][/p][p]Due to the current server overload, many of you have been unable to play the game properly.[/p][p]We sincerely apologize once again for the inconvenience this has caused.[/p][p][/p][p]To fundamentally resolve this issue, we are currently making changes so that key game data can be processed on our own server.[/p][p][/p][p]The scheduled date and time for this update has now been confirmed, and we would like to share it with you in advance.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Update Schedule][/b][/h3][p][b]■ June 15, 2026 (Mon)[/b][/p][p]· 00:00 PDT (San Francisco)[/p][p]· 16:00 KST (Seoul)[/p][p]· 08:00 BST (London)[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Steam Market – Reopening Schedule][/b][/h3][p]■ After the June 15 update, we will announce the reopening schedule again as soon as the server has stabilized.[/p][p]■ Upcoming changes to the Steam Market[/p][p]· In the past, unlimited item listings on the Steam Market led to various side effects.[/p][p]· Accordingly, the number of items that can be listed will be limited as follows: (4 slots provided; new item listing interval changed to 8 hours per slot)[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Known Bugs][/b][/h3][p]■ Discrepancy between the number of Chests you own and the number actually displayed[/p][p]· This bug is presumed to stem from temporary measures taken due to server overload, and it will be fixed together with the June 15 update.[/p][p]■ Abnormally generated items[/p][p]· During the update, items will be cross-checked against the registration information of Steam items, and any item identified as abnormally generated will be deleted.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Terms of Service Update][/b][/h3][p]■ As the game's structure changes to a server-based model, the amount of information we collect will increase.[/p][p]■ Accordingly, the Terms of Service will be updated to include the relevant details. Please refer to the Terms for more information. [url="https://store.steampowered.com//eula/3678970_eula_1"]\[Terms Link][/url][/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Strengthened Verification Process for Users of Unauthorized Programs][/b][/h3][p]■ As the game's structure changes to a server-based model, additional data will be introduced to help identify users of unauthorized programs.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Adjustment of the Minimum Chest Acquisition Request Interval (As Needed)][/b][/h3][p]■ As the number of concurrent users continues to grow, server response delays have been occurring, resulting in reports of delayed Chest generation and items or currency disappearing.[/p][p]■ To reduce these server response delays, the "minimum Chest acquisition request interval" may be adjusted several times before the update.[/p][p]■ After the update, we will gradually restore it to normal while monitoring the server situation.[/p][p][/p][p]We will do our best to complete this update as quickly as possible so that you can once again enjoy a smooth gameplay experience. We sincerely apologize once more for the inconvenience.[/p][p][/p][p]Thank you.[/p][p][/p][p]From the <TBH: Task Bar Hero> Development Team.[/p][p][/p]

newsitems.title: Notice: Temporary Closure of the Steam Market
newsitems.author: nugemstudio
newsitems.contents: [p]Hello,[/p][p]This is the <TBH : Task Bar Hero> development team.[/p][p][/p][p]The feature for listing items on the Steam Market has been temporarily suspended.[/p][p]Accordingly, an update that disables the in-game Trade Ship menu has also been applied.[/p][p]Players on older versions can still enter the Trade Ship menu, but an error will occur and the feature will not work when attempting to load items onto the Trade Ship. We therefore recommend updating to the latest version.[/p][p](*Only the feature for listing new items on the Steam Market is unavailable. You can still cancel your existing listings to retrieve those items, and you can still purchase items listed by other users as normal.)[/p][p][/p][p][b]■ Steam Market temporary closure time: June 8, 2026 (Mon)[/b][/p][p]· 12:00 AM PDT (San Francisco, midnight)[/p][p]· 4:00 PM KST (Seoul)[/p][p]· 8:00 AM BST (London)[/p][p][/p][p][b]■ Update details[/b][/p][p]· The Trade Ship menu has been modified so that it can no longer be accessed.[/p][p][/p][p]This measure is intended to reduce the excessive traffic caused by bots and similar activity.[/p][p]We will announce the exact schedule for when items can be listed on the Market again in a separate notice.[/p][p][/p][p]We sincerely apologize once again for the inconvenience to your gameplay.[/p][p]Thank you.[/p][p][/p][p]The <TBH : Task Bar Hero> Development Team[/p]

newsitems.title: Chest Error Hotfix & Update Postponement Notice
newsitems.author: nugemstudio
newsitems.contents: [p]Hello,[/p][p]This is the <TBH: Task Bar Hero> development team.[/p][p][/p][p]We have identified an issue where chests were not appearing, and a hotfix update has been deployed.[/p][p]In addition, please note that the "Relay Server Addition" update scheduled for tomorrow has been postponed.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Bug Fixes][/b][/h3][p]- The issue where chests did not appear has been fixed.[/p][p]- To reduce the current server load, we have added logic that temporarily holds chest acquisition requests and grants them later all at once in stacked form. As a result, chests may not be granted immediately and may instead be delivered all at once.[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/45637239/f5b4d8d21eff2e2b5953898f6cf9d01b8f0d3ad6.png"][/img][/p][p](*If a large number of chests are stacked in your Steam Inventory, you may need to repeat Mailbox > Refresh > Claim Chest > Open Chest several times until the chests are displayed correctly. [/p][p]If you have many stacked, please do not open a chest immediately after receiving one — instead, tap Refresh, and the chests may be granted up to their maximum quantity. [/p][p]We apologize that this emergency fix may result in a less-than-smooth experience, and we will work toward a complete resolution going forward. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.)[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Update Schedule Postponement][/b][/h3][p]- The "Relay Server Addition" update scheduled for tomorrow has been postponed.[/p][p]- Our testing confirmed that the "Relay Server Addition" alone cannot handle the continuously growing number of concurrent users.[/p][p]- Accordingly, we are building our own dedicated server to fundamentally reduce the load on the Steam servers.[/p][p]- A specific update schedule will be announced again at a later date. We sincerely apologize for the repeated delays.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Temporary Market Closure][/b][/h3][p]- As announced yesterday, the temporary Market closure will proceed as scheduled.[/p][p](*Only listing new items on the Steam Market will be unavailable. You can still cancel your existing listings to retrieve those items, and you can still buy items that other users have listed.)[/p][p][/p][p][b]■ Schedule: June 8, 2026 (Mon)[/b][/p][p]· 12:00 AM PDT (San Francisco, midnight)[/p][p]· 4:00 PM KST (Seoul)[/p][p]· 8:00 AM BST (London)[/p][p][/p][p]We will do our best to complete the update as quickly as possible so that you can play the game normally again.[/p][p]Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.[/p][p][/p][p]Thank you.[/p][p][/p][p]Sincerely,[/p][p]The <TBH: Task Bar Hero> Development Team[/p]

newsitems.title: Temporary Closure of the Steam Market
newsitems.author: nugemstudio
newsitems.contents:
[p]Hello,[/p][p]This is the <TBH: Task Bar Hero> development team.
[/p][p]With an update on June 8, 2026, listing items on the Steam Market will be temporarily disabled.[/p][p](*Only listing new items on the Steam Market will be unavailable. You can still cancel your existing listings to retrieve those items, and you can still buy items that other users have listed.)[/p][h3]
[b]■ Scheduled update time: June 8, 2026 (Mon)[/b][/h3][p]  · 12:00 AM PDT (San Francisco, midnight)[/p][p]  · 4:00 PM KST (Seoul)[/p][p]  · 8:00 AM BST (London)[/p][p]
Bots and similar activity are currently generating excessive traffic.[/p][p]
The Market will return to normal once we have applied a measure to prevent this.[/p][p]
We will share the exact schedule for when item listings can resume in a separate announcement.[/p][p]
We sincerely apologize once again for the inconvenience to your gameplay.[/p][p]
Thank you. [/p]

newsitems.title: [Advance Notice] Upcoming Update
newsitems.author: nugemstudio
newsitems.contents: [p]Hello,[/p][p]This is the <TBH: Task Bar Hero> development team.[/p][p][/p][p]We are aware that many players are currently experiencing difficulties while playing the game, and our entire team is doing everything we can to prepare an update and respond to support inquiries.[/p][p][/p][p]We sincerely apologize for failing to provide a smooth gameplay experience due to our insufficient preparation.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Planned Update Details][/b][/h3][p]- Update content: Addition of a relay server that can filter out the abnormal requests placing a load on Steam servers[/p][p]- Scheduled update time: June 8, 2026 (Mon)[/p][p]  · 12:00 AM PDT (San Francisco, midnight)[/p][p]  · 4:00 PM KST (Seoul)[/p][p]  · 8:00 AM BST (London)[/p][p][/p][h3][b]\[Planned Temporary Measures][/b][/h3][p]- As the number of concurrent users continues to rise, server response delays have occurred, leading to reports of delayed box generation and of items or currency disappearing.[/p][p]- To reduce item loss caused by these server response delays, the "Minimum Box Acquisition Request Interval" may be adjusted several times.[/p][p]  (*Due to the urgency of the situation, three adjustments have already been made since our last notice. We had promised to provide advance notice before making such changes, and we sincerely apologize for not keeping that promise.)[/p][p]  (*Our goal is to restore the "Minimum Box Acquisition Request Interval" to its launch-day level once the update is complete.)[/p][p][/p][p]All of us on the development team are doing our utmost to bring the game back to normal, though we are painfully aware that the pace and quality of our response have not been satisfactory.[/p][p][/p][p]We will work to deploy the update as quickly as possible so that you can enjoy the game normally again.[/p][p][/p][p]Once again, we are deeply sorry for the inconvenience.[/p][p][/p][p]Thank you.[/p][p][/p][p]<TBH: Task Bar Hero> Development Team[/p]

newsitems.title: Hotfix Update [Ver 1.00.09]
newsitems.author: nugemstudio
newsitems.contents: [p] Hello, everyone.[/p][p]This is the development team of <TBH : Task Bar Hero>.[/p][p][/p][p]A hotfix update has been applied.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]■ Bug Fixes[/b][/h3][p]1.Fixed an issue where the background appeared black instead of transparent on certain OS environments.[/p][p]    (*If it does not apply right after the update, restarting the game once will apply it.)[/p][p]2.Fixed an issue where the appropriate Soulstones did not drop from boxes on certain stages.[/p][p]   a. Normal 3-8 to Nightmare 1-8 (Stage Level 30-39): Lowered the drop rate of Normal Soulstones and added a chance for Nightmare Soulstones to drop.[/p][p]   b. Nightmare 3-5 to Hell 2-4 (Stage Level 50-64): Lowered the drop rate of Nightmare Soulstones and added a chance for Hell Soulstones to drop.[/p][p]3.Fixed an issue where the Unique Stats of some equipment were not shown in item descriptions on the Market.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]■ Server Issue[/b][/h3][p]-To reduce server load, we have temporarily increased the minimum request interval for box acquisition.[/p][p]-As there have been reports of items disappearing during Cube operation, we have increased the wait time for server responses.[/p][p]-We are currently working on fixing the build in line with Steam's technical guidelines. The detailed update schedule will be announced separately at a later date.[/p][p][/p][h3][b]■ Customer Support Requests[/b][/h3][p]Due to the high volume of customer support requests, our responses are currently delayed. We apologize to everyone who is waiting for a reply.[/p][p][/p][p]In addition, to ensure accurate communication until the server stabilizes, announcements will be made in English only.[/p][p]We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.[/p][p][/p][p]Thank you. <TBH : Task Bar Hero> Development Team.[/p]
